title.en: Infusion equipment for medical use - Part 4: Infusion sets for single use, gravity feed
title.zh: 医用输液设备 - 第4部分：一次性使用重力式输液器

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for sterilized, single-use infusion sets for gravity-feed infusion of intravenous fluids. Edition 7.
standards.scope: Single-use gravity-feed infusion sets for IV fluid administration.

title.en: Infusion equipment for medical use - Part 8: Infusion equipment for use with pressure infusion apparatus
title.zh: 医用输液设备 - 第8部分：与加压输注装置配合使用的输液设备

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for single-use infusion equipment for use with pressure infusion apparatus. Edition 2. Confirmed 2021.
standards.scope: Single-use infusion equipment for pressure infusion.

title.en: Transfusion equipment for medical use - Part 4: Transfusion sets for single use, gravity feed
title.zh: 医用输血设备 - 第4部分：一次性使用重力式输血器

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for single-use transfusion sets for gravity-feed administration of blood and blood components. Edition 7, published 2025-05.
standards.scope: Single-use gravity-feed transfusion sets for blood products.

title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-24: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of infusion pumps and controllers
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第2-24部分：输液泵和输液控制器的基本安全和基本性能的特殊要求

standards.abstract: Applies to basic safety and essential performance of infusion pumps (syringe, volumetric, ambulatory) and volumetric infusion controllers. Edition 2, confirmed 2020.
standards.scope: Infusion pumps and controllers (syringe pumps, volumetric pumps, ambulatory pumps).

title.en: Medical devices - Non-electrically driven portable infusion devices
title.zh: 医疗器械 - 非电驱动便携式输液装置

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for non-electrically driven portable infusion devices (elastomeric pumps, spring-loaded devices). Confirmed 2020.
standards.scope: Non-electric portable infusion devices (elastomeric pumps, spring-loaded infusers).
